name: Healing Signet
description: Signet. You gain Health. You have -40 armor while using this skill.

name: Resurrection Signet
description: Signet. Resurrect target party member. That party member is returned to life with 100% Health and 25% Energy. This signet only recharges when you gain a morale boost.

name: Power Block
description: Elite Spell. If target foe is casting a spell or chant, that skill and all skills of the same attribute are disabled for seconds and that skill is interrupted.

name: Mantra of Earth
description: Stance. For seconds, whenever you take earth damage, the damage is reduced by % and you gain 2 Energy.

name: Mantra of Flame
description: Stance. For seconds, whenever you take fire damage, the damage is reduced by % and you gain 2 Energy.

name: Mantra of Frost
description: Stance. For seconds, whenever you take cold damage, the damage is reduced by % and you gain 2 Energy.

name: Mantra of Lightning
description: Stance. For seconds, whenever you take lightning damage, the damage is reduced by % and you gain 2 Energy.

name: Hex Breaker
description: Stance. For seconds, the next time you are the target of a hex, that hex fails and the caster takes damage.

name: Distortion
description: Stance. For second[s], you have a 75% chance to block attacks. Whenever you block an attack this way, you lose 2 Energy or Distortion ends.

name: Mantra of Recovery
description: Elite Stance. For seconds, spells you cast recharge 33% faster.

name: Mantra of Persistence
description: Stance. For seconds, any Illusion Magic hex you cast lasts % longer.

name: Mantra of Inscriptions
description: Stance. For seconds, signets you successfully activate while in this stance recharge % faster.

name: Mantra of Concentration
description: Stance. For seconds, the next time you would be interrupted, you are not interrupted.

name: Mantra of Resolve
description: Stance. For seconds, you cannot be interrupted, but each time you would have been interrupted, you lose Energy or Mantra of Resolve ends.

name: Mantra of Signets
description: Stance. For seconds, you have +3 armor for each signet you have equipped. Whenever you use a signet, you gain health.

name: Fragility
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, target and adjacent foes take damage each time they suffer or recover from a new condition.

name: Inspired Enchantment
description: Spell. Removes an enchantment from target foe and gain Energy. For 20 seconds, Inspired Enchantment is replaced with the enchantment removed from target foe.

name: Inspired Hex
description: Spell. Remove a hex from target ally and gain Energy. For 20 seconds, Inspired Hex is replaced with the hex that was removed.

name: Power Spike
description: Spell. If target foe is casting a spell or a chant, that skill is interrupted and target foe takes damage.

name: Power Leak
description: Spell. If target foe is casting a spell or chant, that skill is interrupted and target foe loses Energy.

name: Power Drain
description: Spell. If target foe is casting a spell or chant, that skill is interrupted and you gain Energy.

name: Empathy
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, whenever target foe attacks, that foe takes damage and deals less damage.

name: Shatter Delusions
description: Spell. Remove one Mesmer hex from target foe. If a hex was removed, that foe and all adjacent foes takes damage.

name: Backfire
description: Hex Spell. For 10 seconds, whenever target foe casts a spell, that foe takes damage.

name: Blackout
description: Skill. For seconds, all of touched target foe's skills are disabled, and all of your skills are disabled for 5 seconds.

name: Diversion
description: Hex Spell. For 6 seconds, the next time target foe uses a skill, that skill takes an additional seconds to recharge.

name: Conjure Phantasm
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe experiences -5 Health degeneration.

name: Illusion of Weakness
description: Enchantment Spell. You lose Health. Illusion of Weakness ends if damage drops your Health below 25% of your maximum. When Illusion of Weakness ends, you gain Health.

name: Illusionary Weaponry
description: Elite Enchantment Spell. For 30 seconds, your melee attacks neither hit nor fail to hit. Instead, Illusionary Weaponry deals damage to your targets for each melee attack. You have +5 armor for each equipped Illusion Magic skill.

name: Sympathetic Visage
description: Enchantment Spell. For seconds, whenever target ally is hit by a melee attack, all adjacent foes lose all adrenaline and 3 Energy.

name: Ignorance
description: Hex Spell. For seconds target foe cannot use signets.

name: Arcane Conundrum
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, spells cast by target foe and all adjacent foes take twice as long to cast. When this hex ends, you gain energy.

name: Illusion of Haste
description: Enchantment Spell. For seconds you are no longer Crippled, and you move 33% faster. When Illusion of Haste ends, you become Crippled for 3 seconds.

name: Channeling
description: Enchantment Spell. For seconds, whenever you cast a spell, you gain 1 Energy for each foe in the area.

name: Energy Surge
description: Elite Spell. Target foe loses Energy. For each point of Energy lost, that foe and all nearby foes take 9 damage.

name: Ether Feast
description: Spell. Target foe loses 3 Energy. You are healed for each point of Energy lost.

name: Ether Lord
description: Hex Spell. You lose all Energy. For seconds, target foe suffers Energy degeneration, and you experience + Energy regeneration.

name: Energy Burn
description: Spell. Target foe loses Energy and takes 9 damage for each point of Energy lost.

name: Clumsiness
description: Hex Spell. For 4 seconds, target and adjacent foes are hexed with Clumsiness. The next time each foe attacks, the attack is interrupted and that foe suffers damage.

name: Phantom Pain
description: Hex Spell. For 10 seconds, target foe suffers Health degeneration. When Phantom Pain ends, that foe suffers a Deep Wound, lowering that foe's maximum Health by 20% for seconds.

name: Ethereal Burden
description: Hex Spell. For 10 seconds, target foe moves 50% slower. When Ethereal Burden ends, you gain Energy.

name: Guilt
description: Hex Spell. For 6 seconds, the next time target foe casts a spell that targets a foe, the spell fails and you steal up to Energy from that foe.

name: Ineptitude
description: Elite Hex Spell. For 4 seconds, the next time target foe or any adjacent foe attacks, they take damage and are Blinded for 10 seconds.

name: Spirit of Failure
description: Hex Spell. For 30 seconds, target foe has a 25% chance to miss with attacks. You gain Energy whenever that foe fails to hit in combat.

name: Mind Wrack
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, whenever this foe is the target of any of your non-hex Mesmer skills, that foe loses 1 Energy and takes damage per point of Energy lost. If the target foe's Energy drops to 0, Mind Wrack ends and that foe takes damage.

name: Wastrel's Worry
description: Hex Spell. After 3 seconds, target foe and all adjacent foes take damage. If that foe successfully uses a skill, Wastrel's Worry ends prematurely and does no damage.

name: Shame
description: Hex Spell. For 6 seconds, the next time target foe casts a spell that targets an ally, the spell fails and you steal up to Energy from that foe.

name: Panic
description: Elite Hex Spell. For second[s], target foe and all nearby foes are hexed with Panic. When a foe hexed with Panic successfully uses a skill, all other nearby foes are interrupted.

name: Migraine
description: Elite Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe suffers Health degeneration and takes 100% longer to activate skills.

name: Crippling Anguish
description: Elite Hex Spell. For seconds, target moves and attacks 50% slower and suffers Health degeneration.

name: Fevered Dreams
description: Elite Hex Spell. For seconds, whenever target foe suffers from a new condition, all foes in the area suffer from that condition as well. If target foe has two or more conditions that foe is Dazed for second[s].

name: Soothing Images
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe and all adjacent foes cannot gain adrenaline.

name: Cry of Frustration
description: Spell. If target foe is using a skill, that foe and all foes in the area are interrupted and suffer damage.

name: Signet of Midnight
description: Elite Signet. You and target touched foe become Blinded for 15 seconds.

name: Signet of Weariness
description: Signet. Target foe and all nearby foes lose Energy and suffer from Weakness for second[s].

name: Leech Signet
description: Signet. Interrupt target foe's action. If that action was a spell, you gain Energy.

name: Signet of Humility
description: Signet. Target foe's elite skill is disabled for second[s]. Your non-Mesmer skills are disabled for 10 seconds.

name: Keystone Signet
description: Elite Signet. All of your signets except Keystone Signet are recharged. For 20 seconds, the next time[s] you use a signet that targets a foe, all other foes adjacent to your target take damage and are interrupted.

name: Arcane Mimicry
description: Spell. For 20 seconds, Arcane Mimicry becomes the non-form elite skill from target other ally.

name: Spirit Shackles
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe loses 5 Energy whenever that foe attacks.

name: Shatter Hex
description: Spell. Remove a hex from target ally. If a hex is removed, foes near that ally take damage.

name: Drain Enchantment
description: Spell. Remove an enchantment from target foe. If an enchantment is removed, you gain Energy and Health.

name: Shatter Enchantment
description: Spell. Remove an enchantment from target foe. If an enchantment is removed, that foe takes damage.

name: Elemental Resistance
description: Stance. For seconds, You gain +40 armor against elemental damage, but you lose armor against physical damage.

name: Physical Resistance
description: Stance. For seconds, You gain +40 armor against physical damage, but you lose armor against elemental damage.

name: Echo
description: Elite Enchantment Spell. For 30 seconds, Echo is replaced with the next skill you use. Echo acts as this skill for 30 seconds.

name: Arcane Echo
description: Enchantment Spell. If you cast a spell in the next 20 seconds, Arcane Echo is replaced with that spell for 20 seconds. Arcane Echo ends prematurely if you use a non-spell skill.

name: Imagined Burden
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe moves 50% slower.

name: Chaos Storm
description: Spell. Create a Chaos Storm at target foe's location that lasts for 10 seconds. Each second, foes adjacent to this location take damage and lose Energy.

name: Epidemic
description: Spell. Spread all negative conditions and their remaining durations from target foe to all foes adjacent to your target.

name: Energy Drain
description: Elite Spell. Target foe loses Energy. You gain 3 Energy for each point of Energy lost.

name: Energy Tap
description: Spell. Target foe loses Energy. You gain 2 Energy for each point of Energy lost.

name: Arcane Thievery
description: Spell. For seconds, one random spell is disabled for target foe, and Arcane Thievery is replaced by that spell.

name: Mantra of Recall
description: Elite Enchantment Spell. For 20 seconds, you gain no benefit from it. You gain Energy when Mantra of Recall ends.

name: Animate Bone Horror
description: Spell. Exploit nearest corpse to animate a level bone horror.

name: Animate Bone Fiend
description: Spell. Exploit nearest corpse to animate a level bone fiend. Bone fiends can attack at range.

name: Animate Bone Minions
description: Spell. Exploit nearest corpse to animate two level bone minions.

name: Grenth's Balance
description: Elite Spell. If target foe has more Health than you, you gain half the difference (up to your maximum Health), and that foe loses an equal amount. If this foe has less Health than you, you lose half the difference, and that foe gains an equal amount.

name: Verata's Gaze
description: Spell. If target hostile animated undead has a master, its bond to its master is broken, making it hostile to all other creatures. If it had no master, you become its master. (50% failure chance with Death Magic 4 or less.)

name: Verata's Aura
description: Enchantment Spell. All hostile animated undead in the area become bound to you. Verata's Aura ends after seconds. When Verata's Aura ends, you lose your bond with any undead bound to you. (50% failure chance with Death Magic 4 or less.)

name: Deathly Chill
description: Spell. Target foe is struck for cold damage. If that foe's Health is above 50%, you deal an additional shadow damage.

name: Verata's Sacrifice
description: Spell. For seconds, your undead allies gain +10 Health regeneration. All conditions are removed from those allies and transferred to you. If this spell is successful and you have control of 3 or fewer minions, Verata's Sacrifice instantly recharges.

name: Well of Power
description: Elite Well Spell. Exploit nearest corpse to create a Well of Power at that location. For seconds, allies within the area of Well of Power gain + Health regeneration and +2 Energy regeneration.

name: Well of Blood
description: Well Spell. Exploit nearest corpse to create a Well of Blood at its location. For seconds, allies in that area receive + Health regeneration.

name: Well of Suffering
description: Well Spell. Exploit nearest corpse to create a Well of Suffering at its location. For seconds, foes in that area suffer Health degeneration.

name: Well of the Profane
description: Well Spell. Exploit nearest corpse to create a Well of the Profane at its location. For seconds, foes in that area are stripped of all enchantments and cannot be the target of further enchantments. (50% failure chance with Death Magic 4 or less.)

name: Putrid Explosion
description: Spell. The corpse nearest your target explodes, sending out a shockwave that deals damage to nearby foes.

name: Soul Feast
description: Spell. Exploit nearest corpse to gain Health.

name: Necrotic Traversal
description: Spell. Exploit a random corpse. You teleport to that corpse's location and all nearby foes become Poisoned for seconds.

name: Consume Corpse
description: Spell. Exploit a random corpse. You teleport to that corpse's location and gain Health and Energy.

name: Parasitic Bond
description: Hex Spell. For 20 seconds, target foe suffers -1 Health degeneration. The caster is healed for when Parasitic Bond ends.

name: Soul Barbs
description: Hex Spell. For 30 seconds, target foe takes damage when an enchantment or hex is cast on that target.

name: Barbs
description: Hex Spell. For 30 seconds, target foe takes more damage when hit by physical damage.

name: Shadow Strike
description: Spell. Target foe takes shadow damage. If that foe's Health is above 50%, you steal up to Health.

name: Price of Failure
description: Hex Spell. For 30 seconds, target foe has a 25% chance to miss with attacks and takes damage whenever that foe fails to hit in combat.

name: Death Nova
description: Enchantment Spell. For 30 seconds, if target ally dies, all adjacent foes take damage and are Poisoned for 15 seconds.

name: Deathly Swarm
description: Spell. Deathly Swarm flies out slowly and strikes for cold damage on up to three targets in the area.

name: Rotting Flesh
description: Spell. Target fleshy foe becomes Diseased for seconds, slowly losing Health.

name: Virulence
description: Elite Spell. If target foe was already suffering from a condition, that foe suffers from Disease, Poison, and Weakness for seconds.

name: Suffering
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe and all nearby foes suffer Health degeneration.

name: Life Siphon
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe suffers Health degeneration, and you gain + Health regeneration.

name: Unholy Feast
description: Spell. Steal up to Health from up to foes in the area.

name: Awaken the Blood
description: Enchantment Spell. For seconds, you gain +2 Blood Magic and +2 Curses, but whenever you sacrifice Health, you sacrifice 50% more than the normal amount.

name: Desecrate Enchantments
description: Spell. Target foe and all nearby foes take shadow damage and shadow damage for each enchantment on them.

name: Tainted Flesh
description: Elite Enchantment Spell. For seconds, target ally is immune to disease, and anyone striking that ally in melee becomes Diseased for seconds.

name: Aura of the Lich
description: Elite Enchantment Spell. All corpses within earshot are exploited and you animate a level bone horror plus one for each corpse exploited in this way. For seconds, your Death Magic attribute is increased by +1.

name: Blood Renewal
description: Enchantment Spell. For 7 seconds, you gain + Health regeneration. When Blood Renewal ends, you gain Health.

name: Dark Aura
description: Enchantment Spell. For 30 seconds, whenever target ally sacrifices Health, Dark Aura deals shadow damage to adjacent foes, and you lose Health.

name: Enfeeble
description: Spell. Target suffers from Weakness for seconds.

name: Enfeebling Blood
description: Spell. Target foe and all nearby foes suffer from Weakness for seconds.

name: Blood is Power
description: Elite Enchantment Spell. For 10 seconds, target other ally gains + Energy regeneration.

name: Blood of the Master
description: Spell. All of your undead allies are healed for Health. You sacrifice an additional 2% maximum Health per minion healed in this way.

name: Spiteful Spirit
description: Elite Hex Spell. For seconds, whenever target foe attacks or uses a skill, Spiteful Spirit deals shadow damage to that foe and all adjacent allies of that foe.

name: Malign Intervention
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe receives 20% less benefit from healing. If target foe dies while hexed with Malign Intervention, a level masterless bone horror is summoned.

name: Insidious Parasite
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, whenever target foe hits with an attack, you steal up to Health from that foe.

name: Spinal Shivers
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, whenever target foe is struck for cold damage while using a skill, that foe is interrupted, and you lose Energy or Spinal Shivers ends.

name: Wither
description: Elite Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe suffers Health degeneration and -1 Energy degeneration. If target foe's Energy reaches 0, that foe takes damage and Wither ends.

name: Life Transfer
description: Elite Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe and adjacent foes suffer Health degeneration, which you gain as Health regeneration.

name: Mark of Subversion
description: Hex Spell. For 6 seconds, the next time target foe casts a spell that targets an ally of that foe, the spell fails and you steal up to Health from that foe.

name: Soul Leech
description: Elite Hex Spell. For 10 seconds, whenever target foe casts a spell, you steal up to Health from that foe.

name: Defile Flesh
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe gains only two-thirds Health from healing.

name: Demonic Flesh
description: Enchantment Spell. For seconds, whenever you use a skill that targets a foe, you deal shadow damage to all other foes adjacent to you.

name: Barbed Signet
description: Signet. You inflict Bleeding for seconds on target foe and all adjacent foes.

name: Plague Signet
description: Elite Signet. Transfer all negative conditions with % of their remaining durations from yourself to target foe. (50% failure chance with Curses 4 or less.)

name: Dark Pact
description: Spell. Deal shadow damage to target foe.

name: Order of Pain
description: Enchantment Spell. For 5 seconds, whenever a party member hits a foe with physical damage, that party member does + damage.

name: Faintheartedness
description: Hex Spell. For the next seconds, target foe attacks 50% slower, and that foe suffers Health degeneration.

name: Shadow of Fear
description: Hex Spell. Target foe and all adjacent foes attack 50% slower for the next seconds.

name: Rigor Mortis
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe cannot block.

name: Dark Bond
description: Enchantment Spell. For the next seconds, whenever you receive damage, your closest minion suffers 75% of that damage for you.

name: Infuse Condition
description: Enchantment Spell. For the next seconds, whenever you receive a condition, that condition is transferred to your closest minion instead.

name: Malaise
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe suffers -1 Energy degeneration and you suffer -1 Health degeneration. If target foe's Energy reaches 0, that foe takes damage and Malaise ends.

name: Rend Enchantments
description: Spell. Remove enchantments from target foe. For each Monk enchantment removed, you lose Health.

name: Lingering Curse
description: Elite Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe and all nearby foes suffer Health degeneration, and gain 20% less benefit from healing.

name: Strip Enchantment
description: Spell. Remove enchantment[s] from target foe. If an enchantment is removed, you steal Health.

name: Chilblains
description: Spell. You become Poisoned for 10 seconds. Foes in the area of your target are struck for cold damage and lose enchantment[s].

name: Signet of Agony
description: Signet. You suffer from Bleeding for 25 seconds. All nearby foes take damage.

name: Offering of Blood
description: Elite Spell. You gain Energy.

name: Dark Fury
description: Enchantment Spell. For 5 seconds, whenever any party member hits with an attack, that party member gains one hit of adrenaline. (50% failure chance with Blood Magic of 4 or less.)

name: Order of the Vampire
description: Elite Enchantment Spell. For 5 seconds, whenever a party member who is not under the effects of another Necromancer enchantment hits a foe with physical damage, that party member steals up to Health.

name: Plague Sending
description: Spell. Transfer negative condition[s] and [its/their] remaining duration[s] from yourself to target foe and all adjacent foes.

name: Mark of Pain
description: Hex Spell. For 30 seconds, whenever target foe takes physical damage, Mark of Pain deals shadow damage to adjacent foes.

name: Feast of Corruption
description: Elite Spell. Target foe and all adjacent foes are struck for shadow damage. You steal up to Health from each struck foe who is suffering from a hex.

name: Taste of Death
description: Spell. Steal up to Health from target animated undead ally.

name: Vampiric Gaze
description: Spell. Steal up to Health from target foe.

name: Plague Touch
description: Skill. Transfer negative condition[s] and [its/their] remaining duration[s] from yourself to target touched foe.

name: Vile Touch
description: Skill. Touch target foe to deal damage.

name: Vampiric Touch
description: Skill. Touch target foe to steal up to Health.

name: Blood Ritual
description: Enchantment Spell. For seconds, target touched ally gains +3 Energy regeneration. Blood Ritual cannot be used on the caster.

name: Touch of Agony
description: Skill. Target touched foe takes shadow damage.

name: Weaken Armor
description: Spell. Target foe and foes adjacent to your target have Cracked Armor for seconds.

name: Windborne Speed
description: Enchantment Spell. For seconds, target ally moves 33% faster.

name: Gale
description: Spell. Knock down target foe for 2 seconds. (50% failure chance with Air Magic 4 or less.)

name: Whirlwind
description: Spell. All adjacent foes take cold damage. Attacking foes struck by Whirlwind are knocked down. If you are Overcast, this spell strikes nearby instead of adjacent.

name: Elemental Attunement
description: Elite Enchantment Spell. For seconds, you are attuned to Air, Fire, Water, and Earth and gain + to these attributes. You gain 50% of the base Energy cost of the skill each time you use magic associated with any of these elements.

name: Armor of Earth
description: Enchantment Spell. For 30 seconds, you gain armor, but move % slower.

name: Kinetic Armor
description: Enchantment Spell. For 8 seconds, you gain + armor. Whenever you cast a spell, Kinetic Armor is renewed for 8 seconds.

name: Eruption
description: Spell. Cause an Eruption at target foe's location. Each second for 5 seconds, foes near this location are struck for earth damage and are Blinded for 10 seconds.

name: Magnetic Aura
description: Enchantment Spell. For second[s], you block the next attack against you and deal damage to your attacker. If you are Overcast, all party members in earshot are also enchanted.

name: Earth Attunement
description: Enchantment Spell. For seconds, you are attuned to Earth. You gain 1 Energy plus 30% of the base Energy cost of the skill each time you use Earth Magic.

name: Earthquake
description: Spell. You invoke an Earthquake at target foe's location. All foes near this location are knocked down and are struck for earth damage.

name: Stoning
description: Spell. Send out a large stone, striking target foe for earth damage if it hits. If Stoning hits a foe suffering from Weakness, that foe is knocked down.

name: Stone Daggers
description: Spell. Send out two Stone Daggers. Each Stone Dagger strikes target foe for earth damage if it hits. If you are Overcast, each projectile inflicts Bleeding for second[s].

name: Grasping Earth
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, all nearby foes move 50% slower.

name: Aftershock
description: Spell. Nearby foes are struck for earth damage. Knocked down foes are struck for additional earth damage.

name: Ward Against Elements
description: Ward Spell. You create a Ward Against Elements at your current location. For seconds, non-spirit allies in this area gain +24 armor against elemental damage.

name: Ward Against Melee
description: Ward Spell. You create a Ward Against Melee at your current location. For seconds, non-spirit allies in this area have a 50% chance to block melee attacks.

name: Ward Against Foes
description: Ward Spell. You create a Ward Against Foes at your current location. For seconds, non-spirit foes in this area move 50% slower.

name: Ether Prodigy
description: Elite Enchantment Spell. Lose all enchantments. For seconds, you gain +6 Energy regeneration. When Ether Prodigy ends, you lose 2 Health for each point of Energy you have.

name: Incendiary Bonds
description: Hex Spell. After 3 seconds, target foe and all nearby foes are struck for fire damage and are set on fire for second[s]. Activates early if target foe dies.

name: Aura of Restoration
description: Enchantment Spell. For 60 seconds, you gain Energy and are healed for % of the Energy cost each time you cast a spell.

name: Ether Renewal
description: Elite Enchantment Spell. For seconds, each time you cast a spell, you gain Energy and Health for each enchantment on you.

name: Conjure Flame
description: Enchantment Spell. For 60 seconds, if you're wielding a fire weapon, your attacks strike for an additional fire damage.

name: Inferno
description: Spell. All adjacent foes are struck for fire damage.

name: Fire Attunement
description: Enchantment Spell. For seconds, you are attuned to Fire. You gain 1 Energy plus 30% of the base Energy cost of the skill each time you use Fire Magic.

name: Mind Burn
description: Elite Spell. Target foe and all adjacent foes take fire damage. If you have more Energy than target foe, that foe and all adjacent foes take an additional fire damage and are set on fire for second[s].

name: Fireball
description: Spell. Send out a ball of fire that strikes target foe and all adjacent foes for fire damage.

name: Meteor
description: Spell. Target foe and all adjacent foes are struck for fire damage and knocked down.

name: Flame Burst
description: Spell. All nearby foes are struck for fire damage.

name: Rodgort's Invocation
description: Spell. Target foe and all nearby foes are struck for fire damage and set on fire for second[s].

name: Mark of Rodgort
description: Hex Spell. Target foe and all nearby foes are hexed with Mark of Rodgort. For seconds, whenever each foe is struck for fire damage, that foe is set on fire for second[s].

name: Immolate
description: Spell. Target foe is struck for fire damage and is set on fire for second[s].

name: Meteor Shower
description: Spell. Create a Meteor Shower at target foe's location. For 9 seconds, foes adjacent to that location are struck for fire damage and knocked down every 3 seconds.

name: Phoenix
description: Spell. A fiery Phoenix rises at your location and flies out to your target, exploding on impact. This explosion strikes your target and nearby foes for fire damage. If you are Overcast, allies in the blast radius are healed for Health.

name: Flare
description: Spell. Send out a flare that strikes target foe for fire damage if it hits. If you are Overcast, Flare hits adjacent foes as well.

name: Lava Font
description: Spell. For 5 seconds, foes adjacent to the location where this spell was cast are struck for fire damage each second. If you are Overcast, this spell strikes nearby foes instead of adjacent ones.

name: Searing Heat
description: Spell. Cause Searing Heat at target foe's location. For 5 seconds, foes near this location are struck for fire damage each second. When Searing Heat ends, foes in the area of effect are set on fire for 3 seconds.

name: Fire Storm
description: Spell. Create a Fire Storm at target foe's location. For 10 seconds, foes adjacent to that location are struck for fire damage each second.

name: Glyph of Elemental Power
description: Glyph. For 25 seconds, your elemental attributes are boosted by 2 for your next 10 spells.

name: Glyph of Energy
description: Elite Glyph. Your next spell[s] do[es] not cause Overcast and cost[s] less Energy to cast. Your elemental attributes are increased by.

name: Glyph of Lesser Energy
description: Glyph. For the next 15 seconds, your next 2 spells cost less Energy to cast.

name: Glyph of Concentration
description: Glyph. For 15 seconds, your next 1 spell cannot be interrupted and ignores the effects of being Dazed.

name: Glyph of Sacrifice
description: Glyph. For 15 seconds, your next spell casts instantly, but it takes an additional 30 seconds to recharge. Ends prematurely if you use a non-spell skill.

name: Glyph of Renewal
description: Elite Glyph. For 15 seconds, your next spell instantly recharges.

name: Rust
description: Hex Spell. Deals cold damage to target and adjacent foes. For seconds, target foe and all adjacent foes take twice as long to activate signets. If you are Overcast, foes struck with Rust have their signets interrupted and disabled for second[s].

name: Lightning Surge
description: Elite Hex Spell. After 3 seconds, target foe is knocked down and struck for lightning damage, and has Cracked Armor for seconds. This spell has 25% armor penetration.

name: Armor of Frost
description: Enchantment Spell. For seconds, you gain +40 armor against physical damage and have +1 Water Magic.

name: Conjure Frost
description: Enchantment Spell. For 60 seconds, if you're wielding a cold weapon, your attacks strike for an additional cold damage.

name: Water Attunement
description: Enchantment Spell. For seconds, you are attuned to Water. You gain 1 Energy plus 30% of the base Energy cost of the skill each time you use Water Magic.

name: Mind Freeze
description: Elite Hex Spell. Target foe takes cold damage. If you have more Energy than target foe, that foe suffers an additional cold damage and moves 90% slower for second[s].

name: Ice Prison
description: Hex Spell. For seconds, target foe's legs are encased in ice, causing the foe to move 66% slower.

name: Ice Spikes
description: Hex Spell. Target and adjacent foes are struck for cold damage and move 66% slower for seconds.

name: Frozen Burst
